sections.title: At the start of the event
Attempting to speak to Beverly before continuing with the event

lines.speaker: Beverly
lines.text: Where are our Gingerbread Gnomes!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm working on it, I'm working on it.

lines.speaker: Beverly
lines.text: Hurry up!

lines.speaker: Beverly
lines.text: You've ruined Christmas!

lines.speaker: Beverly
lines.text: Give us the Gnomes!

lines.speaker: Beverly
lines.text: Where are our Gingerbread Gnomes!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey kid, what's all the shouting about?

lines.speaker: Beverly
lines.text: Christmas is ruined!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Again? What's happened this time?

lines.speaker: Beverly
lines.text: The man in the shop won't give us our Gingerbread Gnomes, he's keeping them for himself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That doesn't sound right, are you sure that's really what he's doing?

lines.speaker: Beverly
lines.text: Of course he is, why else won't he give us any?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Something seems off, maybe I should go talk to Santa to find out what's happened.

lines.speaker: Beverly
lines.text: Do whatever you want, I want my Gingerbread Gnomes!

lines.speaker: Beverly
lines.text: Christmas is Saved!

lines.speaker: Beverly
lines.text: Give us the Gnomes!

lines.speaker: Beverly
lines.text: Hurry up with the delivery!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you still here? I saved Christmas, you can go home.

lines.speaker: Child
lines.text: We still have to wait for the delivery to come in, dummy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll leave you to it then.
